operation.name: write_at_psmgr_process_ctrl
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun copy_len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun out_offset () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  copy_len (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  copy_len (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  copy_len (_ bv1 32) ) (select  copy_len (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (=  false (bvule  (bvadd  (concat  (select  out_offset (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  out_offset (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  out_offset (_ bv1 32) ) (select  out_offset (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ?B1 ) (_ bv128 32) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun copy_len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun out_offset () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  copy_len (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  copy_len (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  copy_len (_ bv1 32) ) (select  copy_len (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (bvule  (bvadd  (concat  (select  out_offset (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  out_offset (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  out_offset (_ bv1 32) ) (select  out_offset (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ?B1 ) (_ bv128 32) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_session.next_seq stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets next_seq without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
